A unique identification code associated with a surveyed plot.
Grid coordinates in the Universal Transverse Mercator system, measuring distances in meters from an origin within a specific 6-degree zone. Eastings count meters eastward.
Grid coordinates in the Universal Transverse Mercator system, measuring distances in meters from the central meridian of a UTM zone. Northings count meters northward from the equator.
Plot classification based on the dominan vegetation land-cover (e.g., meadow, shrub, or tree)
A site is a small region of a domain defined by its topography. Several sites were identified based on elevation, aspect, and slope gradients. For each site, several plots were surveyed.
